prophecies.a: 梦见一位年轻的日本歌手意外去世。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of Ozaki Yutaka's death
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a young Japanese singer dying unexpectedly.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1992年4月25日，日本摇滚歌手尾崎丰在26岁时意外死亡，死因至今存在争议。龙树谅在漫画中记录了关于一位年轻歌手去世的预知梦。
prophecies.verdict_en: On April 25, 1992, Japanese rock singer Ozaki Yutaka died unexpectedly at age 26 under disputed circumstances. Tatsuki recorded a prophetic dream about a young singer's death in her manga.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 弗雷迪·墨丘利之死的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见一位外国摇滚歌手去世，后来确认是皇后乐队主唱弗雷迪·墨丘利（Freddie Mercury）。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of Freddie Mercury's death
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a foreign rock singer's death, later identified as Queen frontman Freddie Mercury.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 龙树谅在漫画中记录了1986年11月24日的预知梦，梦见一位外国摇滚歌手去世。1991年11月24日，皇后乐队主唱弗雷迪·墨丘利因艾滋病并发症去世，日期与梦境日期完全一致（相隔整5年同月同日）。
prophecies.verdict_en: Tatsuki recorded a prophetic dream from November 24, 1986, about a foreign rock singer's death. On November 24, 1991, Queen frontman Freddie Mercury died of AIDS-related complications — exactly 5 years later on the same month and day.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 菲律宾皮纳图博火山喷发的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见一座大型火山剧烈喷发，遮天蔽日。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of Mount Pinatubo eruption
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a massive volcanic eruption that darkened the sky.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991年6月15日，菲律宾皮纳图博火山发生20世纪第二大火山喷发，火山灰遮天蔽日，影响全球气候。龙树谅记录了关于大型火山喷发的预知梦，但未指明具体火山名称和日期。
prophecies.verdict_en: On June 15, 1991, Mount Pinatubo in the Philippines had the second-largest volcanic eruption of the 20th century, with ash darkening skies and affecting global climate. Tatsuki recorded a dream about a massive eruption but did not specify the volcano name or date.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 戴安娜王妃事故的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见一位高贵的外国女性在隧道中遭遇车祸。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of Princess Diana's accident
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a noble foreign woman having a car accident in a tunnel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1997年8月31日，戴安娜王妃在巴黎阿尔玛隧道中因车祸身亡。龙树谅记录了梦见一位高贵女性在隧道中遭遇车祸的预知梦，与事故场景吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: On August 31, 1997, Princess Diana died in a car crash in the Pont de l'Alma tunnel in Paris. Tatsuki recorded dreaming of a noble woman in a tunnel car accident, matching the scene of the incident.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 大规模地震的反复预知梦
prophecies.a: 多次梦见日本发生大规模地震，建筑物倒塌，地面开裂。这些梦境促使她在漫画封面上写下了2011年3月的预言。
prophecies.a_en: Repeatedly dreamed of massive earthquakes in Japan with buildings collapsing and ground splitting open. These recurring dreams led her to write the March 2011 prediction on the manga cover.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这些反复出现的地震预知梦最终指向了2011年3月11日的东日本大地震（9.0级），是人类有记录以来第四大地震。梦境中描述的建筑倒塌和地面开裂场景与实际灾害相符。
prophecies.verdict_en: These recurring earthquake dreams ultimately pointed to the March 11, 2011 Tohoku earthquake (magnitude 9.0), the fourth largest earthquake ever recorded. The dream descriptions of collapsing buildings and splitting ground matched the actual disaster.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.a: 「大灾難は2011年3月」（大灾难在2011年3月）。这是她最著名的预言，直接印在1999年出版的漫画《私が見た未来》封面上。
prophecies.q_en: Great disaster in March 2011 — manga cover prediction
prophecies.a_en: "Great disaster in March 2011." This is her most famous prediction, printed directly on the cover of her 1999 manga 'The Future I Saw.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2011年3月11日，日本东北地方太平洋近海发生9.0级大地震，引发巨大海啸，造成约19,747人死亡或失踪，福岛核电站发生严重核泄漏事故。龙树谅在1999年出版的漫画封面上明确写下了「大灾难は2011年3月」，精准预言了这场灾难的时间。
prophecies.verdict_en: On March 11, 2011, a magnitude 9.0 earthquake struck off the Pacific coast of Tohoku, Japan, triggering a massive tsunami that killed approximately 19,747 people and caused the Fukushima nuclear disaster. Tatsuki had written 'Great disaster in March 2011' on her 1999 manga cover, precisely predicting the timing.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.a: 梦见大规模的海啸吞噬海岸线，造成大量伤亡。
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a massive tsunami engulfing coastlines with massive casualties.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2004年12月26日，印度洋发生9.1级地震引发海啸，造成约23万人死亡，波及14个国家。龙树谅记录了关于大规模海啸的预知梦，但未明确指出具体时间和地点，可能与2011年海啸的梦境混合。
prophecies.verdict_en: On December 26, 2004, a magnitude 9.1 earthquake in the Indian Ocean triggered a tsunami killing approximately 230,000 people across 14 countries. Tatsuki recorded prophetic dreams about massive tsunamis, but did not specify exact time or location, and these may have been mixed with her 2011 tsunami dreams.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 新型传染病大流行的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见一种新型传染病在全球蔓延，人们戴着口罩，街道上空无一人。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of a new pandemic
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a new infectious disease spreading globally, with people wearing masks and empty streets.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年初，新型冠状病毒（COVID-19）在全球大流行，各国实施封锁，民众被要求佩戴口罩，城市街道空无一人。龙树谅在漫画中描绘了类似传染病大流行的场景，但未明确指出具体时间和病毒类型。2021年完全版中对此进行了补充说明。
prophecies.verdict_en: In early 2020, COVID-19 became a global pandemic with lockdowns worldwide, mask mandates, and deserted streets. Tatsuki depicted similar pandemic scenes in her manga but did not specify the exact timing or virus type. The 2021 complete edition provided additional commentary.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.a: 龙树谅在漫画走红后选择隐居，她曾梦见自己因预言能力而被过度关注和骚扰，因此决定保护隐私。
prophecies.q_en: Premonition of needing to hide identity
prophecies.a_en: After her manga gained fame, Tatsuki chose to live in seclusion. She had dreamed of being overwhelmed by attention due to her prophetic abilities, leading her to protect her privacy.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 富士山相关的大灾难预言
prophecies.a: 在2021年完全版中，提到2025年7月将发生与富士山喷发或大海啸相关的大灾难。这是她继2011年3月预言之后最受关注的预言。
prophecies.q_en: Great disaster related to Mount Fuji
prophecies.a_en: In the 2021 complete edition, she mentioned a great disaster in July 2025 related to Mount Fuji eruption or a massive tsunami. This is her most discussed prediction after the March 2011 one.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.a: 梦见巨大海啸袭击太平洋沿岸，海水倒灌入城市，高楼被淹没。2021年完全版中将此梦与2025年7月的预言联系起来。
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of a massive tsunami hitting Pacific coastlines, seawater flooding cities, skyscrapers submerged. The 2021 complete edition linked this dream to the July 2025 prediction.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.a: 龙树谅提出预知梦存在「15年周期」规律——梦中看到的事件会在15年后或15的倍数年后发生。她以弗雷迪·墨丘利之死（梦后5年）和东日本大地震（梦后约12-15年）为例证。
prophecies.a_en: Tatsuki proposed that prophetic dreams follow a '15-year cycle' — events seen in dreams occur 15 years or multiples of 15 years later. She cited Freddie Mercury's death (5 years after dream) and the Tohoku earthquake (~12-15 years after dream) as examples.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这一周期理论基于有限的样本归纳，弗雷迪·墨丘利的案例实际间隔为5年（非15年），部分预言的时间间隔也不严格符合15年周期。作为理论框架，缺乏足够的统计样本支撑。
prophecies.verdict_en: This cycle theory is based on limited samples. The Freddie Mercury case actually had a 5-year gap (not 15 years), and some predictions don't strictly follow the 15-year cycle. As a theoretical framework, it lacks sufficient statistical evidence.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 南海海沟巨大地震的暗示
prophecies.a: 在2021年完全版中，暗示日本南海海沟可能发生巨大地震，引发连锁性灾害。
prophecies.a_en: In the 2021 complete edition, hinted at a potential megaquake along Japan's Nankai Trough, triggering cascading disasters.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 人类意识觉醒的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见人类在经历大灾难后迎来意识觉醒，人们开始重新审视生命的意义，社会价值观发生根本性转变。
prophecies.q_en: Prophetic dream of human consciousness awakening
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of humanity experiencing a consciousness awakening after a great disaster, with people reevaluating the meaning of life and fundamental shifts in social values.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records

prophecies.q: 横滨遭遇水灾的预知梦
prophecies.a: 梦见横滨一带遭遇严重水灾，海水涌入城市低洼地带。2021年完全版中特别提及了这一梦境。
prophecies.a_en: Dreamed of severe flooding in the Yokohama area with seawater rushing into low-lying urban zones. This dream was specifically mentioned in the 2021 complete edition.
prophecies.yearReason: 龙树在预知梦记录中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Tatsuki described this period in her prophetic dream records
